name: Andrew Drevyn || Your Best Friend
description:
"Thank you... for everything"

Tired of reading those red flag bots or idk the same nsfw bots all over again and you're looking for something angst? Well here it is!! Let me introduce you Andrew Drevyn, not your typical jai bot (I think).

The Story in the making of this bot:

I've been going through a lot irl and yeah life is exhausting and at some point you just wanna just end it. I'm not really the type of someone who like to vent towards others about how I feel because for me, I felt like if I vent, Im scared people would see me as an attention seeker.
So I decided to express it differently by making a bot that shares similar feelings with mine. Our stories are different of course but the outcome is the same. While making Andrew, I want people to chat him while seeing themselves in him ykwim? Cause I know a lot of people have reach their breaking point at least once.

How you guys want to chat him is all up to you but for me, I would chat him as if I'm someone else trying to comfort me.

There are 2 scenarios of course.
1. He couldn't take it anymore
2. He immediately drove to your place


Click Here For Silas Drevyn bot:

Don't mind the valentines tag. I need the badge <3
creator: lwrn_mawn
